focus_points.label: Energy and motivation levels lately
focus_points.reason: Notes mention a drop in energy since joining. Could be fatigue, personal issues, or something else affecting motivation — worth exploring.

focus_points.label: Connection with the team and peers
focus_points.reason: Missing two team socials signals potential disconnection. Worth asking how they feel about their relationships in the team.

focus_points.label: Blockers on the design-system PR
focus_points.reason: Mention of friction on the design-system PR suggests possible challenges. Clarifying what's stuck could uncover underlying issues.

focus_points.label: Current workload and pacing
focus_points.reason: Slower PR reviews and thinner commits could indicate workload issues. Understanding their current capacity will help frame the conversation.

focus_points.label: Feedback on recent work and collaborations
focus_points.reason: No specific signal — understanding how they perceive feedback from peers could provide insights into their current experience.
